title: FLOSS Weekly 756: We Won, Now What?
summary:
Doc Searls and Simon Phipps talk with Luis Villa of Tidelift about how it helps code maintainers get paid, plus what's happening in AI, ML, regulation and more.
Download or subscribe to this show at https://twit.tv/shows/floss-weekly
Thanks to Lullabot's Jeff Robbins, web designer and musician, for our theme music.
